---
title: "Unit 7 - ANOVA & Regression"
---

> This unit continues talking about ANOVA and then introduces simple linear regression. We try things out and show how to report them and use R to make tables!

[Code File Template](aov-regression.Rmd)

[Full Screen](slides-speaker.html)

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="slides-speaker.html" height="420" width="747" style="border: 1px solid #2e3846;"></iframe>
```
